equipment.head: None
equipment.weapon_costume: Halloween Magic Scroll Costume Halloween Magic Scroll Costume (Event) Halloween Spirit Book

skills.name: Recover
skills.description: Cure various abnormal disease that might afflict team members.

skills.name: Resuscitation
skills.description: Heals a character who is incapable of combat.

skills.name: Cure All
skills.description: Restores HP of an ally by large amount.

skills.name: Mass Cure
skills.description: Fully recover HP of all team members.

skills.name: Consolidation
skills.description: Increases penetration rate.

skills.name: Prompt Action
skills.description: Skill casting time of your family decreases.

skills.name: Divine Bless
skills.description: Increases HP and SP regeneration of your family. Regeneration increases with level.

skills.name: Refresh Mind
skills.description: Clear mind of target to remove abnormal status, and reset all cooldowns for current stance.

skills.name: Principal
skills.description: Provide basic buffs to team. The power can be doubled according to the circumstances.

skills.name: Melee Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Melee Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Magic Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Magic Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Shooting Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Shoot Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Escape Artist
skills.description: Cancel darkness type curse on squad members as well as detect invisibility. Increase resistance of darkness type curse for a given time.

stances.name: Ancient Tactics

skills.name: Miracle
skills.description: Execute a tactic that increases the offensive and defensive capacity of the ally.

skills.name: Protecting Booster
skills.description: Increase the defensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Shearing Booster
skills.description: Increase the offensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Bartor
skills.description: Remove all harmful effects and restore HP of all team members.

effects: Remove harmful effect of own character
Remove harmful effect of own character

skills.name: Additional Training
skills.description: Increase skill level by enhancing own tactical capacity.

effects: Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.
Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 2% of extra [None]

skills.name: Encourage
skills.description: Dramatically enhances the offensive abilities of team members. Cannot be stacked with certain buffs.

skills.name: Pulsate
skills.description: Increases the speed of the designated ally.

skills.name: Meditate
skills.description: Enhances the ATK of the designated ally according to their combat attributes.

effects: Increases ATK according to allys active stance.
Increases stats by +5 according to the active stance or attribute.
Increases ATK according to allys active stance.
Increases stats by +14 according to the active stance or attribute.
Increases ATK according to allys active stance.
Increases stats by +15 according to the active stance or attribute.
Increases ATK according to allys active stance.
Increases stats by +16 according to the active stance or attribute.

skills.name: Netherworld
skills.description: Maximizes the offensive capabilities of the selected character by leveraging their strengths.

skills.name: Additional Assist
skills.description: Installs a tactical trap. Upon casting, reduces the cooldown of all of your characters except [Additional Assist].

effects: The trap detects hidden enemies within 15m and self-destructs towards enemies within 6m
Applies harmful debuff and Increases cooldown of enemy when hit.
The trap detects hidden enemies within 15m and self-destructs towards enemies within 6m
Applies harmful debuff and Increases cooldown of enemy when hit.

skills.name: Operation : C
skills.description: Improves allies ability around.

skills.name: Operation : A
skills.description: Selects a battlefield to operate an attack order.
skills.target: Max Range 15m/ Radius 8m/ Up to 8 enemies

effects: If Amy advances in 5 sec. after [Ambuscade] creation, [Ally][Surprise Reinforcement], [Enemy][Ambush].
If Amy advances in 5 sec. after [Ambuscade] creation, [Ally][Surprise Reinforcement], [Enemy][Ambush].

skills.name: Operation : P
skills.description: Selects a battlefield to protect ally.
skills.target: Max Range 15m/ Radius 8m/ Up to 8 enemies

effects: If Amy advances in 5 sec. after [Protection] creation, [Protection Reinforcement], [Enemy][Ambush].
If Amy advances in 5 sec. after [Protection] creation, [Protection Reinforcement], [Enemy][Ambush].

skills.name: Operation : O
skills.description: Selecting a place that will be ferocious battlefield, increases the overall ability of allies.
skills.target: Max Range 15m/ Radius 8m/ Up to 8 enemies

effects: If Amy advances in 5 sec. after [Air Attack] creation, [Ally][Air Attack Reinforcement], [Enemy][Ambush].
If Amy advances in 5 sec. after [Air Attack] creation, [Ally][Air Attack Reinforcement], [Enemy][Ambush].

skills.name: Operation : S
skills.description: Directs the final battle order.

effects: Does not stack with [Blessing of Saintess].
